name: Bruschetta (Italian Garlic Bread)
recipeIngredient: 2 cloves Garlic, large, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the bread lightly and rub with garlic while still hot.
2. Season each slice with salt and lots of pepper, and pour enough oil on each slice to soak thoroughly.
3. Place two tomato slices on each piece of bread and top with a basil leaf.
4. Sprinkle with Parmigiano-Reggiano and serve immediately.
